frame_analyses.description: Initial view of gauze suspended between clamps with 4cm marked circle, graspers approaching from left and right sides
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good positioning of instruments at corners of marked circle

frame_analyses.description: Right grasper beginning to cut at 12 o'clock position on marked circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate starting position at top of circle

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing clockwise from 12 to approximately 3 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion following circle outline closely

frame_analyses.description: Cutting continues around circle, approaching 6 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining good proximity to marked line

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing past 6 o'clock toward 9 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut path appears to deviate slightly outside marked line at lower portion

frame_analyses.description: Cutting approaching 9 o'clock position, nearing completion of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Visible deviation from marked line at left side of circle

frame_analyses.description: Final cut connecting back to starting point, circular pattern separated
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion with gauze circle fully excised

frame_analyses.description: Task completed, circular gauze piece removed from larger sheet
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Gauze remains attached to clamps throughout procedure

penalties.description: Cut path deviates approximately 3mm outside marked line at 6 o'clock position
Cut path deviates approximately 2mm outside marked line at 9 o'clock position

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of cutting path and circle completion. Some uncertainty in precise mm measurements due to camera angle and gauze texture making exact line visualization challenging.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviations at all 8 cardinal points due to gauze texture and lighting
Precise deviation measurements at 1:30 and 10:30 positions partially obscured
technique_summary: Solid intermediate performance with systematic clockwise cutting approach. Primary penalty from modest deviations at lower quadrant of circle. Good overall circle completion and gauze handling.
strengths: Systematic cutting approach starting at 12 o'clock
Maintained gauze attachment to clamps throughout
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining tighter adherence to marked line, especially at 6 and 9 o'clock positions
Consider slower cutting pace in challenging curve sections to improve precision
